query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
## Summary

**The direct answer to your research question:** As of June–July 2026, there is exactly **one** confirmed $10B+ M&A deal by a Magnificent 7 company in 2026:

### Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.57 billion)
- **Announced:** April 14, 2026 (rumored from ~April 2 at a lower ~$9B figure)
- **Status:** PENDING — expected to close in 2027, subject to FCC/regulatory approval
- **Purpose:** Boost Amazon's "Leo"/Kuiper satellite network to compete with SpaceX Starlink
- **Apple angle:** Amazon is also acquiring Apple's ~20% Globalstar stake; Amazon's network will power Apple's satellite features (Emergency SOS, Find My, etc.)

### No other Mag 7 $10B+ deals
- **Meta–Manus (~$2B):** BLOCKED by China's NDRC and being unwound
- **Tesla–unnamed AI hardware co. (up to $2B):** disclosed in April Q1 filing
- All other activity (Nvidia's Intel/Anthropic/OpenAI stakes, Google DeepMind acquihires, Meta's robotics buy) is well below $10B or consists of minority investments, not acquisitions

### Key context
Big Tech M&A is at a **decade low** (PitchBook: 12 deals YTD 2026). The Mag 7 are pouring $600–725B into AI infrastructure capex and minority stakes rather than large takeovers, partly due to heightened antitrust scrutiny (DOJ, UK CMA). For comparison, the other big 2026 satellite deal — Rocket Lab's $8–14B Iridium acquisition (June 29) — is **not** a Magnificent 7 company.

I found no evidence of any pending or firmly rumored $10B+ acquisition by Alphabet, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, or Tesla as of mid-2026.

key_facts: Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.57B, announced April 14, 2026) is the ONLY confirmed $10B+ M&A deal by a Magnificent 7 company in 2026; it is pending, expected to close in 2027 subject to FCC approval.
The Amazon-Globalstar deal targets satellite internet to compete with SpaceX Starlink via the 'Amazon Leo' network; total value could reach ~$15B including debt/milestones.
Amazon separately agreed to buy Apple's ~20% stake in Globalstar; Amazon's Leo network will power Apple iPhone/Watch satellite features (Emergency SOS, Messages, Find My, Roadside Assistance).
No other Magnificent 7 company (Alphabet, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) has an announced or firmly rumored acquisition at or above $10B in 2026 as of June–July 2026.
Meta's ~$2B acquisition of AI startup Manus was blocked by China's NDRC (April 27, 2026) on national-security grounds and was being unwound by mid-2026.
Tesla disclosed an up-to-$2B acquisition of an unnamed AI hardware company (April 2026 Q1 filing; $200M fixed + $1.8B milestone-contingent, paid in stock).
PitchBook (June 4, 2026): Big Five tech acquisition deals at a decade low (12 YTD 2026 vs 7 in 2024, 14 in 2025); capital redirected to AI infrastructure and minority stakes.
Big Tech is deploying ~$600–725B in combined 2026 AI capex and funding via bonds/equity (Nvidia $25B bonds, Amazon $37B, Alphabet ~$84.75B equity), not large acquisitions.
Heightened antitrust scrutiny (DOJ flagging 'acquire-and-hire', UK CMA probing Microsoft) is discouraging large Big Tech takeovers in 2026.
Nvidia's large 2026 outlays (Intel $5B, Anthropic up to $10B, OpenAI $30B) are minority equity investments/commercial commitments, not acquisitions.
For comparison, the second major 2026 satellite consolidation — Rocket Lab's $8–14B acquisition of Iridium (June 29, 2026) — is NOT a Magnificent 7 company.
